Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Remixed Cosmetics

Remixed Cosmetics

Overview

This article is about updated and remade cosmetics. For cosmetics which are fused with others, see Fused Cosmetics.

Remixed Cosmetics are a collection of Cosmetic Items in Fortnite, which are heavily based off pre-existent cosmetics. The term originates from the codenames of Season X's Battle Pass Outfits.

This list contains remixed versions of original cosmetics.

Reskins refer to items which use the same or very similar model to their base cosmetic. They do not add a significant amount of changes to the item and as such are essentially recolors of existing items. These will often have a prefix relating to a new rarity, such as Frozen for Frozen Series or Dark for Dark Series.

Remakes, on the other hand, refer to items which use the same character or idea, but are significantly changed, using new colors, shapes and other details.

The classification of an outfit as a reskin or remake of another does not necessarily imply that the characters are the same or connected within the game's lore.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Some cosmetics are not directly stated to be a remix of a pre-existing Outfit. Instead, their connection can be inferred from their CIDs
    • An example of that is Verge and Shore Leave, Verge's CID being "MilitaryFashion1", and Shore Leave's CID being "MilitaryFashionSummer".
References

References[]

  1. ↑ Blue Striker's ID is CID_138_Athena_Commando_M_PSBurnout.
  2. ↑ Match Point's ID is CID_468_Athena_Commando_F_TennisWhite. Tennis being Volley Girl's codename.
  3. ↑ Recon Ranger's ID is CID_503_Athena_Commando_F_TacticalWoodlandFuture. TacticalWoodland being Trailblazer's codename.
  4. ↑ The Scientist's ID is CID_540_Athena_Commando_M_MeteorManRemix. MeteorMan being The Visitor.
  5. ↑ The Scientist was originally named "Visitor Volta" prior to a hotfix on September 14th 2019.
  6. ↑ The Seven Set was originally named Visitor Set.
  7. ↑ Swamp Stalker's ID is CID_526_Athena_Commando_F_DesertOpsSwamp. DesertOps being Scorpion's codename.
  8. ↑ Payback's ID is CID_524_Athena_Commando_F_FutureBikerWhite. FutureBiker being Mika's codename.
  9. ↑ Red Jade's ID is CID_545_Athena_Commando_F_SushiNinja. Sushi being Maki Master's codename.
  10. ↑ Slingshot's ID is CID_552_Athena_Commando_F_TaxiUpgrade. Taxi being Whiplash's codename.
  11. ↑ Manic's ID is CID_546_Athena_Commando_F_TacticalRed. Tactical being Elite Agent's codename.
  12. ↑ Starlie's ID is CID_539_Athena_Commando_F_StreetGothCandy. StreetGoth being Lace's codename.
  13. ↑ Vix's ID is CID_751_Athena_Commando_F_NeonCatSpy. NeonCat being Lynx's codename.
  14. ↑ Fade's old codename was DarkDrift.
  15. ↑ Par Patroller's ID is CID_801_Athena_Commando_F_GolfSummer. Golf being Birdie's codename.
  16. ↑ Rally Raider's ID is CID_775_Athena_Commando_F_StreetRacerCobraGold. StreetRacerCobra being Shade's codename.
  17. ↑ Aspen's ID is CID_A_064_Athena_Commando_F_SurvivalSpecialistAutumn.
  18. ↑ Fixer's ID is CID_A_101_Athena_Commando_M_TacticalWoodlandBlue. TacticalWoodland being Battlehawk's codename.
  19. ↑ Sorina's ID is CID_A_379_Athena_Commando_F_VampireHunter. Vampire being Dusk's codename.
  20. ↑ Panther's ID is CID_A_398_Athena_Commando_F_NeonCatSpeed. NeonCat being Lynx's codename.
  21. ↑ Vivica Saint's ID is Character_CavalryAlt. Cavalry being Victoria Saint's codename.
  22. ↑ Rogue Navigator uses a different character model than B.R.U.T.E. Navigator, making him a remake not a reskin.
  23. ↑ Boss Obsidian's ID is Character_GoldenGuardAntler. GoldenGuard being Gildhart's codename.
  24. ↑ Felina's description used to be "'An assassin-class autono-bot from Kata Tech's secretive Re-Lynxed lab".
Fan-made Fortnite wiki. Not affiliated with Epic Games.
About Epic Games
